phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the old town centre
phrases.text_local: Pouvez-vous m'indiquer le chemin vers le vieux centre d'Amboise ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY-voo man-dee-KAY luh shuh-MAN vair luh VYUH SAHN-truh dahm-BWAZ
phrases.cultural_note: The old town of Amboise sits at the base of the château rock, with medieval streets, Renaissance townhouses, and the weekly market along the Loire.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which street has the best restaurants
phrases.text_local: Quelle rue est la plus animée pour les restaurants ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel ROO ay lah ploos ah-nee-MAY poor lay res-toh-RAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The streets around Place Michel-Debré and Rue Nationale in the old town are lined with restaurants, crêperies, and wine bars serving Touraine specialities.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the medieval half-timbered houses are
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je voir les maisons à colombages médiévales ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh vwar lay may-ZOHN ah koh-lom-BAZH may-dee-ay-VAL
phrases.cultural_note: Several half-timbered houses (maisons à colombages) survive in the old town and date from the 15th and 16th centuries, when Amboise was a royal city.

responses.english: In the old town center around Place Joyeuse and rue de la Concorde.
responses.french: Dans le vieux centre autour de la Place Joyeuse et rue de la Concorde.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where I can buy local wine and produce to take home
phrases.text_local: Où puis-je acheter du vin et des produits locaux à emporter ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo PWEE-zhuh ash-TAY doo VAN ay day proh-DWEE loh-KOH ah ahm-por-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Several cave cooperatives and épiceries fines in the old town sell Touraine wines, rillettes (potted pork), and Sainte-Maure de Touraine cheese.
